features.featureTitle: Rewrite frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx so that all navigation elements are always rendered and never hidden due to layout or overflow issues. The navbar must use a flex layout with `flex-nowrap` and `overflow-visible` on the desktop nav container so items are never clipped or collapsed. The three nav links must be: 'Home' (always visible, navigates to /), 'Dashboard' (visible only when the user is authenticated, navigates to /dashboard), and 'Admin Panel' (visible only when the user is authenticated AND isAdmin is true, navigates to /admin). The Login/Logout button must always be visible on the right side of the navbar, never wrapped or hidden. On desktop (md and above), all visible links and the Login/Logout button must appear in a single horizontal row without overflow. On mobile, the hamburger menu must include the same conditional link set (Home always, Dashboard if authenticated, Admin Panel if authenticated + isAdmin) plus the Login/Logout action. The mobile menu must open and close reliably with no z-index or overflow conflicts.
